items.caption: A drug test kit with a label that reads "specimen" and "confidential" placed on a clipboard. the clipboard is open, revealing a form with various fields and checkboxes, and there is a section titled "on copy 1 do not copy." the form appears to be a standard drug test result sheet, and the text on the clipboard suggests that the contents of the test are confidential. taken from a perspective that focuses on the clipboard and the drug test kit, with the background being out of focus.
